issues_found: Source is a listing/navigation page (container page) containing only links to historical Monetary Policy Reports, not actual report content
No substantive monetary policy analysis, economic data, or policy discussion present
Per Rule 8: listing_page type must not be accepted
Per Rule 9: container pages should bias toward reject, not accept
Archive value is too low - this page serves only as a directory index
Individual Monetary Policy Reports must be accessed via separate document links

corrected_fields.summary: This source is a navigation/index page listing historical Monetary Policy Report links from 1996 to 2025. It contains no substantive content from any actual report—no policy discussions, economic data, or analysis. The page merely enumerates dates and document formats (HTML/PDF) available for each reporting period.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This page has no standalone archival value for research purposes. It provides no actionable information about monetary policy, economic developments, or market-relevant content. Actual reports must be accessed via individual document links.
